name: Duatt
description: Dual attenuator/attenuverter/mixer in 1U format. Each channel switchable between unipolar attenuator and bipolar attenuverter. No input defaults to +5V DC. Channel A has 2x voltage multiplier switch.

controls.name: Attenuator A
controls.description: Scales channel A input voltage. Behavior depends on Polarity Switch A setting.

controls.name: Polarity Switch A
controls.description: UNI: standard attenuator (0 to full). -/+: bipolar attenuverter (invert to unity, noon = zero).

controls.name: Ax2 Switch
controls.description: Doubles the voltage at Channel A's input. Enables +10V or -10V DC offset generation.
controls.detail: Up = x2 active · works on internal +5V too (gives ±10V)

controls.name: Attenuator B
controls.description: Scales channel B input voltage. Behavior depends on Polarity Switch B setting.

inputs.name: IN A
inputs.description: Input for Channel A. No cable: internal +5V DC. Doubled if Ax2 switch is on.

inputs.name: IN B
inputs.description: Input for Channel B. No cable: internal +5V DC.

outputs.name: OUT A
outputs.description: Output of Channel A. When unpatched, A is summed into OUT B.

outputs.name: OUT B
outputs.description: Output of Channel B. Contains A+B sum when OUT A is unpatched.

behaviors.name: CV attenuation
behaviors.description: Reduces CV amplitude for subtle modulation. Ideal for scaling LFO depth before sending to filter or VCA CV inputs.

behaviors.name: Signal inversion
behaviors.trigger: CV → IN A · -/+ mode · knob CCW
behaviors.description: Inverts a signal (e.g., turns an ADSR into a falling envelope for inverse VCA or filter control).

behaviors.name: CV mixing
behaviors.description: Channels A and B are summed at OUT B, enabling two CV sources to control one destination.

behaviors.name: DC offset / voltage source
behaviors.description: With no input, knob generates -5V to +5V DC (or -10V to +10V with Ax2). Useful for pitch offsets or static CV.

patchIdeas.name: LFO depth control
patchIdeas.patch: LFO → IN A · UNI mode · dial amount with knob · OUT A → filter CV
patchIdeas.diagram:
Duatt:
* Polarity Switch A: UNI
- LFO (Out) >> Duatt (IN A)
- Duatt (OUT A) >> VCF (Cutoff) // depth via knob

patchIdeas.name: Inverted envelope
patchIdeas.patch: ADSR → IN A · -/+ mode · knob past noon CCW · OUT A → VCA or VCF
patchIdeas.diagram:
Duatt:
* Polarity Switch A: -/+
- ADSR (Out) >> Duatt (IN A)
- Duatt (OUT A) >> VCF (Cutoff) // knob CCW inverts

patchIdeas.name: Note range + offset
patchIdeas.patch: S&H → IN B · attenuate range · Channel A (-/+ unpatched) offsets pitch down · OUT B → VCO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Duatt:
* Polarity Switch A: -/+
* Polarity Switch B: UNI
- S&H (Out) p> Duatt (IN B)
- Duatt (OUT B) p> VCO (V/Oct) // A offsets, B attenuates
